title: Log Parameters Management in Hadoop MapReduce v2
description: The LogParams.java file is part of the Hadoop MapReduce v2 library, responsible for encapsulating and managing log parameters. It stores crucial job identifiers such as container ID, application ID, node ID, and owner. The class uses simple data storage through private instance variables, providing constructors and getter/setter methods for initialization and retrieval. Although it doesn't handle inputs or outputs directly, it stores parameters that are likely used elsewhere for logging or tracking within the Hadoop MapReduce framework. The class's dependencies are primarily within the `org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.v2` package, suggesting its role in the broader Hadoop MapReduce v2 architecture, specifically in managing job-related information.

TITLE: Log Parameters Management in Hadoop MapReduce v2

DESCRIPTION:
The LogParams.java file is part of the Hadoop MapReduce v2 library, responsible for encapsulating and managing log parameters. It stores crucial job identifiers such as container ID, application ID, node ID, and owner. The class uses simple data storage through private instance variables, providing constructors and getter/setter methods for initialization and retrieval. Although it doesn't handle inputs or outputs directly, it stores parameters that are likely used elsewhere for logging or tracking within the Hadoop MapReduce framework. The class's dependencies are primarily within the `org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.v2` package, suggesting its role in the broader Hadoop MapReduce v2 architecture, specifically in managing job-related information.
